data.title: BitMart launches BERA perpetual contract
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch the Berachain (BERA) perpetual contract at 23:00 (UTC+8) on February 6, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 20 times, and open the BERA/USDT trading pair.
Berachain is a high-performance EVM-identical layer 1 (L1) blockchain that uses liquidity proof (PoL) consensus to coordinate network-level liquidity and security, built on a modular evm-centric consensus client framework called BeaconKit.

source: https://coinpedia.org/news/trump-media-files-trademarks-for-truthfi-investment-vehicles-including-bitcoin-plus-etf/

data.title: The three major U.S. stock indexes rose at the opening, and Coinbase rose 1.58%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. stocks opened, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 88 points, the S&P 500 rose 0.23%, and the Nasdaq rose 0.16%. Coinbase rose 1.58%, Roblox (RBLX.N) fell 20%, and the company's daily active users in the fourth quarter were lower than expected.

source: https://coinpedia.org/news/telegram-forces-ton-connect-on-crypto-wallets-sparking-controversy/

data.title: BlackRock's Ethereum ETF ETHA holdings have surpassed Grayscale's ETHE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official data from BlackRock, as of February 5, its Ethereum exchange-traded fund iShares Ethereum Trust ETF (ETHA) held 1,352,934.4641 ETH, with a market value of US$3,748,047,875.17; and according to official data from Grayscale, as of February 5, its Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF held 1,327,729.9587 ETH, with a market value of US$3,669,048,967.92, which means that BlackRock ETHA holds about 25,200 more ETH than ETHE.

data.title: Bybit will launch BERAUSDT perpetual contract
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, the cryptocurrency exchange Bybit will launch the BERAUSDT perpetual contract.

data.title: NEAR Foundation Launches NEAR AI Agent Fund
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, the NEAR Foundation launched the NEAR AI Agent Fund. The fund will deploy $20 million in liquidity to the chain, focusing on expanding the development of fully autonomous and verifiable agents built on NEAR technology, providing support for new decentralized AI use cases and mass-market consumer solutions.

data.title: ARK Invest's ARKK fund sells $6.9 million worth of Robinhood stocks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Arkk Daily monitoring, ARKK fund under ARK Invest reduced its holdings of Robinhood stocks worth US$6.9 million.

data.title: 1inch Network Integrates ZKsync to Expand Cross-Chain Swap Capabilities
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Decentralized exchange aggregator 1inch Network has integrated ZKsync (a Layer2 expansion solution for Ethereum) to expand its cross-chain exchange capabilities and provide a faster and lower-cost cross-chain transaction experience. 1inch said that the function is powered by its "Fusion+" technology and launched a beta version in September last year, which has facilitated millions of transactions. Currently, ZKsync is advancing its expansion plan with the goal of achieving 10,000 transactions per second and exploring the possibility of zero-fee transactions in the future. (CoinDesk)
